creator: grahamperrin@freebsd.org
text:
Whilst writing <https://reviews.freebsd.org/D3207#808568> with reference to OpenZFS documentation …

I noticed that <https://www.freebsd.org/cgi/man.cgi?query=zfs&sektion=8&manpath=FreeBSD>, which currently defaults to 13.1-RELEASE, has (at least) a DESCRIPTION that is not consistent with what's given for OpenZFS. 

For example, this is not seen in the FreeBSD version: 

> … tunables (zfs_*) are explained in zfs(4). …

The same problem with <https://www.freebsd.org/cgi/man.cgi?query=zfs&sektion=8&manpath=FreeBSD+13.0-RELEASE#DESCRIPTION>. 

<https://www.freebsd.org/cgi/man.cgi?query=zfs&sektion=8&manpath=FreeBSD+14.0-current#DESCRIPTION> for 14.0-CURRENT _does_ have the hint about tunables.
